CustomField.description: True when EnabledDateTime__c is non-null and in the past AND DisabledDateTime__c is null or in the future. Mirrors the DH DateTime-toggle pattern as a derived boolean for filtering.
CustomField.formula: NOT(ISBLANK( EnabledDateTime__c )) && EnabledDateTime__c <= NOW() && (ISBLANK( DisabledDateTime__c ) || DisabledDateTime__c > NOW())
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated: feature is currently active when Enabled has passed and Disabled is either blank or still in the future.
CustomField.label: Active
